title: Spicy Peruvian Potatoes
description: A fusion of Chinese and Peruvian flavors, these spicy potatoes are easy to make and perfect for a quick snack.
instructions: 1. Preheat the oil in a wok or deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
2. Peel and cut the potatoes into wedges.
3. In a bowl, mix the flour, chili peppers, and aji amarillo paste.
4. Add the potato wedges to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
5. Fry the potatoes in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Drain the potatoes on paper towels.
7. Serve the spicy potatoes hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
